letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice megacloud-202601

To the Billing Department, MegaCloud Inc.:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice megacloud-202601, covering the
billing period 2026-01-01 through 2026-01-31.

Per the governing clause (Amendment 2 §3):

    "Effective January 1, 2025, the per-seat fee set forth in MSA Section 6.2 is amended to $16.50 per active seat per month."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $199,441.60.
The invoice as billed totals $231,057.60, a discrepancy of $31,616.00.

Calculation:
  - seat usage: expected 221824.00, billed 253440.00 (overcharge of 31616.00)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $31,616.00 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: Effective January 1, 2025, the per-seat fee set forth in MSA Section 6.2 is amended to $16.50 per active seat per month.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 31616.00.
